prompt:
Output Python code only. Define exactly one function:

def drive_forward(speed, seconds):
    ...

No imports, classes, markdown, helper functions, print, or main block. Return only one string. If speed <= 0 or seconds <= 0 return 'invalid'. Otherwise return f'forward:{speed}:{seconds}'.

Output Python code only. Define exactly one function:

def stop_if_obstacle_detected(distance_cm):
    ...

No imports, classes, markdown, helper functions, print, or main block. Return True when distance_cm is None or <= 15, else False.

Output Python code only. Define exactly one function:

def toggle_run_mode(current_mode, button_pressed):
    ...

No imports, classes, markdown, helper functions, print, or main block. If button_pressed is True, switch run <-> pause. If False, keep current_mode. Always return only 'run' or 'pause'.
